hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE 'git[[:space:]]+commit'; then BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); if [ "$BRANCH" = "main" ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"禁止直接在 main 上提交，请切换到 feature branch 再工作"}}'; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: 检查是否在 main 上提交...
